condition: CPU.socket == Motherboard.socket AND CPU memory platform supports Motherboard.memory_type
CPU.socket IN Cooler.supported_sockets AND CPU.tdp_w_est <= Cooler.max_tdp_w
M.2 NVMe requires m2_slots > 0; SATA requires sata_ports > 0; USB external requires USB port
PSU.wattage_w >= GPU.required_psu_w_est AND required GPU connector exists or can be adapted safely
PSU.form_factor in Case.psu_form_factor AND PSU.length_mm <= Case.max_psu_length_mm
Air cooler height <= case max height OR AIO radiator <= case radiator support
